{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = White District
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] is attempting to establish a [[White District]] in his territory.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7">''City of Light'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[White District]] is a location in the City.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
